rag_rules: Use assign only for implementation scope outputs or auxiliary variables
Place input assumptions and output guarantees in type scope when using concrete bounds or visible relations
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for clear contracts
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers in the same annex
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use assign only for implementation scope outputs or auxiliary variables
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for clear contracts
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types
Do not use unresolved identifiers in guarantees
